citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 3:40 PM on 6 April
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by calling and leaving voicemails and text message before
departing at 4:30 PM. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the
AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 3:40 PM on 6 April 
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by calling and leaving voicemails and text message before 
departing at 4:30 PM. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the 
AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
